apply isIntegrallyClosed_iff_le_integralClosure.2
  intro x hx

  simp only [Subalgebra.mem_comap, Subalgebra.mem_map, Subtype.exists, Subtype.forall,

  obtain ⟨s, hs_fin, hs_nonzero, hx'⟩ := hx
  have h4 : ∀ p : PrimeSpectrum A, p.1.primeHeight = 1 → x ∈ (Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors : Subalgebra A (FractionRing A)) := by
    intro p hp
    have h5 := h3 p hp
    have h6 : IsIntegrallyClosed (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := h5.toIsIntegrallyClosed
    have h7 : algebraMap A (Localization p.1.primeCompl) x ∈ integralClosure (algebraMap A (Localization p.1.primeCompl)) (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := by
      apply h6.integralClosure_le
      exact hx'
    simp only [Subalgebra.mem_comap, Subalgebra.mem_map, Subtype.exists, Subtype.forall] at h7
    obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := h7
    exact ht
  have h8 : x ∈ ⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1},
    Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors := by
    apply iInf_mem_of_mem
    exact h4
  rw [h1] at h8

  have h1 : ∀ p ∈ s, IsLocalRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := fun p hp ↦

    rw [IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot]

  have h3 : x ∈ ⨅ p ∈ s, Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl
      p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors := by
    refine mem_iInf_of_mem _ fun p hp ↦ ?_
    have : IsDiscreteValuationRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
      IsKrullDomain.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization p (hs hp)
    have : IsIntegrallyClosed (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := this.to_isIntegrallyClosed
    have : algebraMap A (Localization p.1.primeCompl) x ∈
        integralClosure (Localization p.1.primeCompl) (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := by
      apply this
      exact isIntegral_algebraMap_of_isIntegral hx
    simp_all [integralClosure_self]
  simp_all

apply isIntegrallyClosed_iff_isIntegrallyClosed_fractionRing.mpr
  intro x hx
  obtain ⟨s, hs, hxs⟩ := IsKrullDomain.finite x.2
  have h1 : ∀ p ∈ s, IsLocalRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := fun p hp ↦
    (IsKrullDomain.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization p (hs hp)).toIsLocalRing
  have h2 : ⨅ p ∈ s, Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors = ⊥ :=
    IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot A
  exact Subring.mem_Inter.mpr fun p ↦
    if h : p.1.primeHeight = 1 then
      have : x ∈ Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors := by
        cases' em (p ∈ s) with hps hps
        · exact hxs hps
        · have : x.1 ∉ p.1 := by
            contrapose! hps
            exact ⟨p, h, hps⟩
          rw [Localization.subalgebra_coe_eq] at *
          simpa [this] using hx
      this
    else by
      have : p.1 = ⊥ := Ideal.prime_eq_bot_or_height_pos.mp p.2 |>.resolve_right fun h' ↦
        h' (by simp_all)
      simp_all

apply isIntegrallyClosed_iff_le_integralClosure.2
  intro x hx
  have h₁ := IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot A
  have h₂ := IsKrullDomain.finite A
  have h₃ := IsKrullDomain.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization
  simp only [Subalgebra.mem_comap, Subalgebra.mem_map, Subtype.exists, Subtype.forall,
    FractionRing.mk_eq_div, exists_prop] at hx
  obtain ⟨s, hs_fin, hs_nonzero, hx'⟩ := hx
  have h₄ : ∀ p : PrimeSpectrum A, p.1.primeHeight = 1 → x ∈ (Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors : Subalgebra A (FractionRing A)) := by
    intro p hp
    have h₅ := h₃ p hp
    have h₆ : IsIntegrallyClosed (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := IsDiscreteValuationRing.isIntegrallyClosed h₅
    have h₇ : algebraMap A (Localization p.1.primeCompl) x ∈ integralClosure (algebraMap A (Localization p.1.primeCompl)) (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := by
      apply isIntegral_algebraMap_of_isIntegral hx
    exact h₆.le_integralClosure (algebraMap A (Localization p.1.primeCompl)) x h₇
  have h₈ : x ∈ ⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1},
    Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors := by
    apply iInf_mem_of_mem
    intro p hp
    exact h₄ p (Set.mem_setOf.mp hp)
  rw [h₁] at h₈
  exact Subalgebra.mem_bot.1 h₈

  intro x hx

  have hbiInf : ⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1},

apply isIntegrallyClosed_iff_isIntegrallyClosed_fractionRing.mpr

    (by infer_instance)
  exact h2.integralClosure_eq.mp rfl x h'
